backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Testimonial type and an in-memory map store with functions to add, get, and list all testimonials.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying that ServiceDetailPanel's 'Get Started' button must trigger EagleClickAnimation, block scroll during playback, and then scroll to #contact on completion.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app that mounts the root div, loads the main TSX module, and embeds a Jotform agent script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally shows IntroAnimation on first session visit, then renders all page sections with scroll-triggered visibility animations via useSectionAnimation.
frontend/src/components/AboutUsSection.t: About section with an AI illustration, company description, feature highlights with check icons, and CTA buttons that scroll to the contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/AIPerformanceSec: Section displaying four animated AI performance metric cards with counter animations, a testimonial blockquote, and a workflow visualization image with pulsing node overlays.
frontend/src/components/animations/ChatB: Animates a chat conversation by sequentially revealing message bubbles with a typing indicator between each message, then resets and loops.
frontend/src/components/animations/Email: Displays an email pipeline with four stages connected by an animated progress line and flowing email icons moving across the pipeline.
frontend/src/components/animations/Mobil: Renders a floating animated smartphone illustration with a glowing neon-blue screen UI to represent mobile app development.
frontend/src/components/animations/Neura: Canvas-based animation that draws moving nodes with glowing connections and animated data-flow particles to visualize a neural network.
frontend/src/components/animations/Websi: Animates a website layout assembling itself by sequentially sliding in header, sidebar, content, and footer components on a loop every 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/animations/Workf: Canvas-based animation that draws a four-node workflow graph with labeled nodes and animated glowing particles flowing along the connecting edges.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with cards for name, phone, WhatsApp, Instagram, and email, featuring intersection-observer-based fade-in animations and a scroll-highlight effect.
frontend/src/components/EagleClickAnimat: Full-screen overlay animation component that plays a multi-stage eagle logo reveal sequence (fade, draw, expand, particles, pulse, scale, fadeout) when activated, then calls an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/EagleLogo.tsx: Displays the SwiftOps eagle head logo inside a circular neon-glowing container with layered ambient glow effects, entry animations (tracked via sessionStorage), and hover interactions.
frontend/src/components/EliteClientProfi: Renders a three-card testimonials section featuring executive client profiles with photos, titles, company types, and quotes, animated on scroll via intersection observer.
Email capture CTA section with a form that triggers the EagleClickAnimation before scrolling to the contact section, using a ripple effect on the submit button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand identity, social media icon links, categorized navigation link columns, copyright notice, and a 'Built with Caffeine.ai' attribution.
frontend/src/components/FounderSection.t: Renders a glassmorphism card section displaying founder Shaikh Zeeshan's name, title, and bio with animated background orbs and floating effects.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with parallax background, floating particles, eagle logo, and CTA buttons that trigger a ripple/click animation before scrolling to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Displays a three-step process (Connect, Deploy, Scale) in animated glass cards with icons, connected by a horizontal gradient line on desktop.
frontend/src/components/IntegrationsSect: Shows a horizontally auto-scrolling marquee of 10 integration names (Slack, Salesforce, etc.) with intersection-observer-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/IntroAnimation.t: Full-screen cinematic intro animation featuring deterministic floating particles, volumetric light rays, and a completion callback to transition into the main app.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware glassmorphism styling, active section highlighting, ripple effects, a mobile sheet menu, and a CTA button that triggers the eagle click animation.
frontend/src/components/NeonCursor.tsx: Renders a custom neon glow cursor on desktop that follows mouse movement and can be paused/resumed via custom window events.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ServiceDetailPan: A modal panel component that displays detailed information about a selected service, including a service-specific animation, features list, and a CTA button that triggers an eagle click animation before closing.
Renders a grid of clickable service cards with hover effects and fade-in animations, opening a ServiceDetailPanel when a card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/StatsSection.tsx: Displays four animated counter statistics (tasks automated, integrations, uptime, clients) that count up when the section scrolls into view.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/data/servicesData.ts: Defines the `ServiceData` interface and exports an array of six service entries (AI Agents, Chatbots, Email Automation, Workflow Automation, Website Development, App Development) with titles, descriptions, features, icons, and image paths.
frontend/src/hooks/useActiveSection.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver on a list of section IDs to track and return the currently visible section as the user scrolls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity or an anonymous identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCounterAnimation.t: Custom hook that animates a numeric counter from 0 to a target value over a specified duration using requestAnimationFrame, optionally triggered by a boolean flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCTAClick.ts: Custom hook that orchestrates a premium CTA click flow: triggers an animation, locks interaction for 700ms, performs a cinematic scroll to the contact section, and auto-focuses the first input with a neon glow effect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` React context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that observes a referenced DOM element with IntersectionObserver and returns a boolean indicating whether it is currently intersecting the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom hook that listens to the window scroll event and returns a vertical offset value scaled by a configurable speed for parallax effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query backend hooks; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed for the static site.
frontend/src/hooks/useRippleEffect.ts: Custom hook that returns a `createRipple` callback which appends a ripple DOM element to a clicked button and removes it after 600ms.
frontend/src/hooks/useSectionAnimation.t: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set an `isVisible` flag when a referenced section enters the viewport, supporting optional animation delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useServicePanel.ts: Custom hook managing open/close state and the active `ServiceData` item for a service detail panel, with a delayed clear on close to allow exit animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with dark-mode CSS variables, and defines utility classes for neon text glow, glassmorphism cards, GPU acceleration, and smooth scroll behavior.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/utils/scrollHelpers.ts: Provides scroll utility functions including smooth scrolling to elements with offset, a highlight effect dispatcher, a combined scrollToSection helper, and a cinematic requestAnimationFrame-based scroll with ease-in-out-quart easing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom neon/dark colors, Orbitron and Inter fonts, CSS variable-based design tokens, accordion keyframes, and the tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a cinematic neon website, recording existing features and pending requests to add EagleClickAnimation-then-scroll behavior to Services section 'Get Started' buttons without altering their appearance.
